## beehiiv automations journey

Show a single automation journey

### Synopsis

Show a single automation journey by automation ID and journey ID.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/automations/{automationId}/journeys/{automationJourneyId}

```
beehiiv automations journey <automationId> <automationJourneyId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv automations journey aut_123 journey_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for journey
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
